## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting to align on RunPod's content strategy and GrowthX's programmatic SEO engagement](https://fathom.video/share/izxgaC1csrWBs7hkyF4fZJ9Av_ATXqZP?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [RunPod aims to boost brand visibility and activations through programmatic SEO and AISEO](https://fathom.video/share/izxgaC1csrWBs7hkyF4fZJ9Av_ATXqZP?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [Target audience: AI/tech startups, large enterprises, academic institutions, dev teams](https://fathom.video/share/izxgaC1csrWBs7hkyF4fZJ9Av_ATXqZP?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)
  - [Content strategy: Editorial blog (product-focused) + programmatic articles (broader topics)](https://fathom.video/share/izxgaC1csrWBs7hkyF4fZJ9Av_ATXqZP?tab=summary&timestamp=2569.0)
  - [Website refresh coming in 1-2 months; content to be published on main domain](https://fathom.video/share/izxgaC1csrWBs7hkyF4fZJ9Av_ATXqZP?tab=summary&timestamp=3363.0)

## Topics

### RunPod's Content Goals

  - [Drive activations through programmatic articles and AISEO](https://fathom.video/share/izxgaC1csrWBs7hkyF4fZJ9Av_ATXqZP?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
  - [Boost brand visibility in AI search results (e.g., ChatGPT)](https://fathom.video/share/izxgaC1csrWBs7hkyF4fZJ9Av_ATXqZP?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [Dominate keywords and outperform competitors in SEO](https://fathom.video/share/izxgaC1csrWBs7hkyF4fZJ9Av_ATXqZP?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [Increase citations and referrals from AI models](https://fathom.video/share/izxgaC1csrWBs7hkyF4fZJ9Av_ATXqZP?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)

### Target Audience & Competitors

  - [Primary: AI/tech startups (esp. image generation), large enterprises, academic institutions](https://fathom.video/share/izxgaC1csrWBs7hkyF4fZJ9Av_ATXqZP?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)
  - [Secondary: Dev teams, tech enthusiasts, hobbyists](https://fathom.video/share/izxgaC1csrWBs7hkyF4fZJ9Av_ATXqZP?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)
  - [Key competitors: CoreWeave, Modal, Vast AI](https://fathom.video/share/izxgaC1csrWBs7hkyF4fZJ9Av_ATXqZP?tab=summary&timestamp=3141.0)
  - [Hyperscalers: Amazon, Microsoft, Google (less direct competition)](https://fathom.video/share/izxgaC1csrWBs7hkyF4fZJ9Av_ATXqZP?tab=summary&timestamp=3176.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Editorial blog (runpod.io/blog): Product-focused, human-written](https://fathom.video/share/izxgaC1csrWBs7hkyF4fZJ9Av_ATXqZP?tab=summary&timestamp=2569.0)
  - [Programmatic articles (runpod.io/articles): Broader topics, AI-generated](https://fathom.video/share/izxgaC1csrWBs7hkyF4fZJ9Av_ATXqZP?tab=summary&timestamp=2569.0)
  - [Focus on serverless technology, GPU comparisons, and use cases](https://fathom.video/share/izxgaC1csrWBs7hkyF4fZJ9Av_ATXqZP?tab=summary&timestamp=2093.0)
  - [Aim to improve solution awareness, especially for serverless offerings](https://fathom.video/share/izxgaC1csrWBs7hkyF4fZJ9Av_ATXqZP?tab=summary&timestamp=2139.0)

### SEO Considerations

  - [Current domain authority: 41 (higher than expected for stage)](https://fathom.video/share/izxgaC1csrWBs7hkyF4fZJ9Av_ATXqZP?tab=summary&timestamp=2478.0)
  - [Moving blog from subdomain to main domain (runpod.io/blog) in upcoming website refresh](https://fathom.video/share/izxgaC1csrWBs7hkyF4fZJ9Av_ATXqZP?tab=summary&timestamp=2533.0)
  - [Programmatic content to live on runpod.io/articles](https://fathom.video/share/izxgaC1csrWBs7hkyF4fZJ9Av_ATXqZP?tab=summary&timestamp=2569.0)

### GrowthX Engagement Process

  - [Week 1-2: Research, identify opportunities, generate keyword clusters](https://fathom.video/share/izxgaC1csrWBs7hkyF4fZJ9Av_ATXqZP?tab=summary&timestamp=2923.0)
  - [Week 3-4: Calibration articles, feedback, and refinement](https://fathom.video/share/izxgaC1csrWBs7hkyF4fZJ9Av_ATXqZP?tab=summary&timestamp=2855.0)
  - [Aim for consistent publishing volume by week 4](https://fathom.video/share/izxgaC1csrWBs7hkyF4fZJ9Av_ATXqZP?tab=summary&timestamp=2876.0)
  - [Use Airtable for content pipeline management and collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/izxgaC1csrWBs7hkyF4fZJ9Av_ATXqZP?tab=summary&timestamp=3052.0)

## Next Steps

  - [RunPod to share additional context: ICP docs, competitive docs, call recordings](https://fathom.video/share/izxgaC1csrWBs7hkyF4fZJ9Av_ATXqZP?tab=summary&timestamp=3389.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin research and opportunity identification](https://fathom.video/share/izxgaC1csrWBs7hkyF4fZJ9Av_ATXqZP?tab=summary&timestamp=2923.0)
  - [Explore possibility of testing content earlier than week 3](https://fathom.video/share/izxgaC1csrWBs7hkyF4fZJ9Av_ATXqZP?tab=summary&timestamp=3375.0)
  - [RunPod to provide access for content publishing before website refresh](https://fathom.video/share/izxgaC1csrWBs7hkyF4fZJ9Av_ATXqZP?tab=summary&timestamp=3368.0)
  - [Schedule next meeting to review topical clusters and refine content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/izxgaC1csrWBs7hkyF4fZJ9Av_ATXqZP?tab=summary&timestamp=3419.0)
